title: Hackcraft's Hackpad
description: Adds a simple hackpad to the game so you can send quick chat messages whenever you want
body:
# HackCraft: Hackpad Edition
This mod adds
two items. A hackpad and a hackpad MCU.

## Crafting Recipes
### Hackpad
![Hackpad Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff15f6c1222ba6a5234b7905e87354f9d7f27a5d.png)
### Hackpad MCU
![MCU Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e620d82117d9e09ee4c65ba81649ca28a14b5299.png)
## Usage
1. Open the MCU GUI
![MCU GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f6d19396fcb24efd61bab947c5689d6a157218d_0.webp)
You can type different messages into each of the MCU's fields.
After that, click on "Write to Flash"
2. Anvil the MCU into the hackpad

![Anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cfb28dd887588d41c71df14cfb75e75ba6757ac.png)
Open an anvil and forge the MCU onto the Hackpad
3. Open the Hackpad
![Hackpad GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5b205f15323fa6a992c872915be61694d90c423_0.webp)
Now when you open the Hackpad and click on one of the set messages, the message will be sent to the chat.

This can be useful as a quick chat menu, to quickly send frequently typed messages.
# Credits
- https://github.com/FMG9167 Thank you very very much for helping with the anvil recipe creation thingy
- @felix on Slack for helping me with literally whatever I need help with
- @BetterClient on Slack for helping me get started (honestly HUGE help from him!!)
